extortion.description: HTC Global Services, established in 1990 and headquartered in Troy, Michigan is a provider of information technology and business process services.  The company offers grant management software that automates the grant management process. HTC has installed Enterprise Grants Management System (EGrAMS)for various states and state agencies in USA.  HTC is a Tier 2 investment partner of Kuali Foundation to develop and deliver next-generation library management system for various universities.
